Title: Site Data Feed to Corporate - Scheduled Data Import Executes Successfully

Step Action: Confirm that a scheduled import interval has been configured for the target site
Step Expected: The import schedule is configured and active in the system

Step Action: Wait for or simulate the scheduled interval trigger (e.g. NVD data sequence runs or Inventory import occurs)
Step Expected: The mechanism detects that site data is ready for import

Step Action: Verify the import process initiates automatically at the configured interval
Step Expected: The data import from site to corporate begins without manual intervention

Step Action: Monitor the import process through to completion
Step Expected: The import completes without errors

Step Action: Navigate to the corporate UI and verify the timestamp of last successful import is updated
Step Expected: A timestamp reflecting the current successful import is displayed in the corporate UI

Step Action: Successfully verified that site data is imported to the corporate solution at the configured interval and the last successful import timestamp is updated in the corporate UI

Title: Site Data Feed to Corporate - Timestamp of Last Successful Import Displayed in Corporate UI

Step Action: Log in to the corporate UI with valid credentials
Step Expected: The corporate UI dashboard is displayed

Step Action: Navigate to the section where site data import information is shown
Step Expected: The site data import status section is accessible

Step Action: Verify that a timestamp field for last successful data import is visible
Step Expected: A timestamp of the last successful import is displayed on the page

Step Action: Confirm the timestamp value reflects a real date and time in the expected format
Step Expected: The timestamp is in the correct format and contains a valid date/time value

Step Action: Cross-reference the displayed timestamp with the most recently completed import event
Step Expected: The displayed timestamp matches the actual last successful import time

Step Action: Successfully verified that the timestamp of the last successful data import from site to corporate is visible and accurate in the corporate UI

Title: Site Data Feed to Corporate - Import Triggered After NVD Data Sequence Runs

Step Action: Confirm the NVD data sequence is configured to trigger a site-to-corporate import check
Step Expected: The system is configured to check for updates when the NVD data sequence completes

Step Action: Initiate or simulate the NVD data sequence on the site
Step Expected: The NVD data sequence runs and completes on the site

Step Action: Verify the system detects the completed NVD data sequence as a trigger for site data import
Step Expected: The mechanism identifies NVD sequence completion as a relevant update event

Step Action: Confirm the import of site data to corporate initiates following the NVD data sequence
Step Expected: Data import from site to corporate begins after the NVD sequence completes

Step Action: Verify the import completes successfully and the corporate UI timestamp is updated
Step Expected: Import completes without errors and the last successful import timestamp reflects the current run

Step Action: Successfully verified that a completed NVD data sequence on the site triggers a data import to the corporate solution and updates the last successful import timestamp

Title: Site Data Feed to Corporate - Import Triggered After Inventory Import Occurs

Step Action: Confirm the system is configured to detect an inventory import as a trigger for site-to-corporate data feed
Step Expected: The system is set up to monitor for inventory import completion

Step Action: Initiate or simulate an inventory import on the site
Step Expected: The inventory import runs and completes on the site

Step Action: Verify the system detects the completed inventory import as a relevant update event
Step Expected: The mechanism identifies inventory import completion as a trigger for corporate data import

Step Action: Confirm the import of site data to corporate initiates following the inventory import
Step Expected: Data import from site to corporate begins after inventory import completes

Step Action: Verify the import completes and the last successful import timestamp in the corporate UI is updated
Step Expected: Import completes without errors and the corporate UI reflects the updated timestamp

Step Action: Successfully verified that a completed inventory import on the site triggers a data import to the corporate solution and updates the last successful import timestamp

Title: Site Data Feed to Corporate - Help Topic Content Available for Site Data Feed Feature

Step Action: Log in to the corporate UI with valid credentials
Step Expected: The corporate UI dashboard is displayed

Step Action: Navigate to the Help section or click the Help icon
Step Expected: The Help menu or help content page is accessible

Step Action: Search or browse for help content related to site data feed or corporate import
Step Expected: Help search returns relevant results

Step Action: Open the help topic related to site data feed to corporate
Step Expected: The help topic opens and content is displayed

Step Action: Verify the help topic covers the scheduled import interval functionality
Step Expected: Content describes how site data is regularly imported to the corporate solution

Step Action: Verify the help topic includes information about the last successful import timestamp
Step Expected: Content explains how to find and interpret the last successful data import timestamp in the corporate UI

Step Action: Successfully verified that help topic content exists and is accessible for the site data feed to corporate feature covering scheduled import and last successful import timestamp

Title: Site Data Feed to Corporate - No Import Occurs When No Update Events Detected

Step Action: Log in to the corporate UI and note the current last successful import timestamp
Step Expected: The current timestamp is recorded for comparison

Step Action: Ensure no NVD data sequence and no inventory import has occurred on the site since the last import
Step Expected: The site has no new relevant update events

Step Action: Wait for one or more import check intervals to pass
Step Expected: The scheduled interval elapses

Step Action: Navigate to the corporate UI and check the last successful import timestamp
Step Expected: The last successful import timestamp is unchanged

Step Action: Verify no new import records or data changes are present that would indicate an unintended import
Step Expected: No new import occurred without a triggering event

Step Action: Successfully verified that a site-to-corporate import does not occur when no relevant update event has been detected

Title: Site Data Feed to Corporate - Last Successful Import Timestamp Not Updated on Failed Import

Step Action: Log in to the corporate UI and note the current last successful import timestamp
Step Expected: The current timestamp is recorded

Step Action: Simulate or configure conditions that will cause the site-to-corporate import to fail (e.g. network interruption or invalid data)
Step Expected: Failure conditions are in place

Step Action: Trigger or wait for the scheduled import interval to occur
Step Expected: The import process initiates

Step Action: Observe that the import process encounters an error and does not complete successfully
Step Expected: The import fails with an error or warning

Step Action: Navigate to the corporate UI and check the last successful import timestamp
Step Expected: The timestamp remains unchanged from the value recorded in step 1

Step Action: Verify an error state or alert is present to indicate the import did not succeed
Step Expected: The UI or system indicates the import failure without overwriting the last successful timestamp

Step Action: Successfully verified that a failed import does not update the last successful import timestamp in the corporate UI

Title: Site Data Feed to Corporate - Import Does Not Run at Unpredictable Intervals

Step Action: Review the configured import schedule or interval setting for the site-to-corporate feed
Step Expected: The configured interval is documented and known

Step Action: Trigger an update event (NVD sequence or inventory import) and note the time the import completes
Step Expected: First import timestamp is recorded

Step Action: Trigger another update event and note the time the second import completes
Step Expected: Second import timestamp is recorded

Step Action: Calculate the time elapsed between the two import completions and compare to the configured interval
Step Expected: The interval between imports aligns with the configured schedule

Step Action: Repeat the check for a third import cycle to confirm consistency
Step Expected: The third import also adheres to the configured interval

Step Action: Successfully verified that data imports from site to corporate occur at a consistent and predictable interval as configured
